hero.title: Recovery begins with an honest conversation
hero.subtitle: Addiction consulting for individuals dealing with substance dependency, co-dependency, and ACoA patterns. Evidence-based practice integrating 12-step methodology.

about.heading: Valentin Maksimov
about.bio: For over 10 years I have worked with people whose lives are touched by addiction — their own or someone close to them. My approach combines the structure of 12-step programs with an academic foundation: TIP 35 protocol, Nati Ronel's research, and the conceptual work of Toni A. I work in Russian, Hebrew, and English.

items.title: 12-Step Integration
items.desc: Adapting program structure to individual needs without dogmatism

items.title: ACoA Profile Work
items.desc: Processing childhood trauma, destructive patterns, and co-dependent behaviors

items.title: Evidence-Based Practice
items.desc: TIP 35 protocol, Nati Ronel's research — rigorous professional standards

items.title: Full Confidentiality
items.desc: Complete privacy. Work in a protected, non-judgmental space

items.title: Individual consultation
items.desc: Initial meeting or working session. Assessment of the situation, setting goals.

items.title: Program companionship
items.desc: Systematic work through the 12-step program with individual adaptation.

items.title: Family consulting
items.desc: Working with co-dependent patterns within the family system.

items.q: Where do I start if I'm not sure I have an addiction?
items.a: Start with the initial screening. It's a free questionnaire, after which I will contact you personally and answer all your questions with no obligation.

items.q: Do you work online or only in person?
items.a: I conduct sessions both via video call (Zoom) and in person in Israel.

items.q: How much does a consultation cost?
items.a: Cost is discussed individually after the initial screening. Write to me — I will answer honestly.

items.q: Do you work with families of addicted people?
items.a: Yes. Co-dependency and work with loved ones is a separate, important direction of my practice.
Absolute. No records under your name are publicly accessible. Form data is stored in an encrypted database.

items.title: What is co-dependency and how to recognise it
items.excerpt: Co-dependency often hides behind care. We examine the key signs and ways out.

items.title: 12 Steps: myths and reality
items.excerpt: Why the program works not as a religion but as a structure. What actually happens in meetings.

items.title: ACoA — adult children of dysfunctional families
items.excerpt: The ACoA profile: where chronic patterns come from and how to work with them in therapy.

contact.heading: Book a consultation
contact.subtitle: The initial screening is a short questionnaire. I will contact you personally within 24 hours, with no intermediaries.
